females.name: Joy
females.markings: Beautiful golden-apricot coat with silky ears
females.description: Sweet, gentle, and deeply affectionate. Joy lives up to her name — she lights up every room and is perfect for families with children. She loves cuddles and has been raised with early socialization.

females.name: Chica
females.markings: Classic black and white parti-color pattern
females.description: Playful, curious, and people-oriented. Chica thrives on attention and bonding. She follows you everywhere and has an endearing personality that makes her impossible to resist.

females.name: Maple
females.markings: Stunning light apricot and soft cream coloring
females.description: Maple is the calm, wise one of the litter. Intelligent and quick to learn, she is ideal for families who want an easy-going companion who adapts beautifully to any home environment.

males.name: Dino
males.description: Confident, friendly, and outgoing. Dino is the adventurer of the group — great for active families who enjoy walks, hikes, and outdoor adventures. Full of energy and heart.

males.name: Romeo
males.description: Loving, playful, and people-focused. Romeo is very affectionate and social — he adores being held and will melt your heart from day one. A true companion dog through and through.

males.name: Rio
males.description: Energetic, fun, and great with kids. Rio is the playful spirit — always ready for a game of fetch or a romp in the yard. He is perfect for families who enjoy an active, cheerful dog.

males.name: Cooper
males.markings: Beautiful black and white parti-color pattern
males.description: Smart, eager to please, and wonderfully gentle. Cooper is incredibly trainable and loves learning new tricks. He will grow into a well-mannered, loyal companion that the whole family will adore.

males.name: Duncan
males.description: Calm, sweet, and deeply loyal. Duncan bonds quickly and loves nothing more than curling up beside you after an adventure. He has the classic Cocker Spaniel temperament — gentle yet spirited.

males.name: Moritz
males.description: Distinguished, affectionate, and wonderfully expressive. Moritz has that undeniable spaniel charm — big soulful eyes, silky ears, and a personality that wins everyone over instantly.

females.name: Rosie
females.markings: Warm golden-roan coat with silky feathering
females.description: Rosie is a gorgeous golden roan English Cocker Spaniel with a gentle, playful temperament. She is wonderfully people-oriented and has been raised around children and other dogs from birth.

females.name: Belle
females.markings: Rich liver-roan coat with classic ticking
females.description: Belle is a beautiful liver roan with an affectionate, sweet-natured personality. Curious and bright, she adapts well to both active and relaxed family environments.

females.name: Hazel
females.markings: Stunning blue-roan pattern with white highlights
females.description: Hazel is an elegant blue roan English Cocker with a lively, intelligent character. She loves to play and explore, and her bright eyes and expressive ears make her irresistible.

females.name: Ivy
females.markings: Vivid orange-and-white parti-color with rich feathering
females.description: Ivy is a vibrant, confident English Cocker Spaniel who loves attention. Her bold orange and white coloring is matched by her bold, outgoing personality — perfect for active families.

males.name: Archer
males.markings: Deep chocolate roan with a velvety finish
males.description: Archer is a handsome chocolate roan English Cocker with a loyal, energetic nature. He is smart, easy to train, and thrives on human companionship — a true working-dog heart in a family dog's body.

males.name: Chester
males.markings: Classic black and white with ticked markings
males.description: Chester is a striking black and white English Cocker full of character. Playful, gentle, and endlessly curious, he settles quickly into family life and loves being part of every activity.

males.name: Jasper
males.markings: Pale lemon roan with delicate ticking
males.description: Jasper is a rare and beautiful lemon roan English Cocker with a calm, steady temperament. Loving and obedient, he is ideal for first-time spaniel owners wanting a devoted companion.

males.name: Rufus
males.markings: Rich solid red-golden coat with cream undertones
males.description: Rufus is a solid golden-red English Cocker with a warm, affectionate soul. He is enthusiastic, tail-wagging happy, and bonds quickly — the kind of dog that becomes the heart of the home.
